questions.question: What type of flights are being conducted as indicated by IR678?

choices.text: IFR military training route above 1,500 feet AGL
VFR military training route above 1,500 feet AGL
VFR military training route below 1,500 AGL

questions.question:
Search for KAND on http://vfrmap.com/

What ATC permissions are required to operate near Anderson Airport?

Search for KECG in vfrmap.com

With ATC authorization, you are operating your small unmanned aircraft approximately 4 miles southeast of Elizabeth City Regional Airport. What hazard is indicated to be in that area?

choices.text: High density military operations in the vicinity.

questions.question:
Search for KADS on vfrmap.com

The airspace directly overlaying Addison Airport (ADS) is ...

choices.text: Class D up to but not including 3,000 feet MSL
Class D up to 3,000 feet MSL
Class E from the surface up to 3,000 feet MSL

questions.question:
Search for KSUX in vfrmap.com

You are hired to inspect the railroad tracks from the town of Hinton, north of Sioux City, to the town of Winnebago, which is south of Sioux City. Will you require ATC authorization?

choices.text: Yes, your route of flight will pass through Class D airspace
Yes, your route of flight will pass through Class E airspace
No, the flight will remain clear of controlled airspace
